title: gomphia scheffleri
intro: Gomphia scheffleri, also known as the African Bushwillow, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gomphia scheffleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional African medicine to treat a range of ailments.
